datapoints.description: Proxy repository auto-block state (0=ok, 1=blocked; hosted/group repos always report 0)
datapoints.name: proxy_blocked

description: Per-repository online/offline status and proxy auto-block detection for Nexus Repository Manager via REST API
technicalNotes: Discovery uses GET /service/rest/v1/repositories which returns all repos with name, format, type, url, and online fields. Collection re-fetches the list for online status. For proxy repos, fetches GET /v1/repositories/{format}/proxy/{name} to check httpClient.connection.blocked and auto-block state. Hosted and group repos always report proxy_blocked=0.
name: Nexus_Repository_Status
